bibliography:
D. Halliday, R. Resnick e J. Walker, Fundamentos de Física, Mecânica, vol. 1, 9ª edição, editora LTC D. Halliday, R. Resnick e J. Walker, Fundamentos de Física, Eletromagnetismo, vol. 3, 9ª edição, editora LTC
	D. Halliday, R. Resnick e J. Walker, Fundamentos de Física, Mecânica, vol. 1, 9ª edição, editora LTC D. Halliday, R. Resnick e J. Walker, Fundamentos de Física, Eletromagnetismo, vol. 3, 9ª edição, editora LTC
methodology: Projects for students of making a computer program for solving a problem in physics.
objectives: Understanding of the motion of bodies, i.e. kinematics. Understanding the forces that act on bodies and solving the equations of motion, i.e dynamics. Understanding work and energy. Understanding electric field and the electric potential, i.e. electrostatics. Understanding electric currents and solving circuits with direct electric currents.
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme:
.Physical quantities, dimensions and systems of units.
	Reference frame, position and trajectory. One-dimensional movement.
	Motion in space. Projectiles and circular motion.4Newton's laws. Types of forces, gravitational force.
	Applications of Newton's laws: inclined plane, wheels, oscillating spring, pendulum.
	Work. Conservative forces and potential energy.
	Conservation of mechanical energy.
	Center of mass, impulse and linear momentum.Collisions.
	Moment of a force, moment of inertia and angular momentum.
	Coulomb's law, electric field.
	Electric potential and capacitors.
	Electric current and electrical resistance.
	Electric circuits. Kirchhoff's laws
presentation: Classical mechanics, electrostatics and direct currents.
